overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City showing the player character (Tommy Vercetti) walking and running along a sandy urban beach. The character approaches and passes a distinctive art deco hotel tower with palm trees, transitioning from walking to running as the camera faces into bright sun glare. The scene features a tropical 1980s Miami-inspired coastal environment with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach with art deco hotel

events.description: character begins walking forward along the beach after facing a pedestrian
approaching the large art deco hotel building in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the Ocean View Hotel, passing other beachgoers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in swimwear initially facing the ego character before moving away

entered.detail: tall art deco style hotel with green and beige facade and distinctive blue roof structure
tall blue-green residential high-rise building with grid windows
tropical palm trees lining the beachfront
sandy beach terrain covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny tropical beach with the player character walking toward a distinctive art deco hotel tower. The sandy beach stretches out with scattered pedestrians, while a tall residential building looms on the left. Palm trees line the approach to the hotel as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: character looks up at the hotel building while continuing to walk forward
passing the hotel building into more open beach area with palm tree clusters

agents.ego_description: walking past the Ocean View Hotel, looking up at its architecture and the surrounding palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in swimwear walking along the shoreline in the distance

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees at the base of the hotel building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches close to the Ocean View Hotel, looking up at its towering art deco facade. Dense palm tree clusters line the base of the building as the character walks past. The beach remains sandy and open, with the hotel dominating the view before gradually moving to the side.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the beach
sun glare becomes prominent as camera faces toward the bright sun

agents.ego_description: running along the open beach away from the hotel area toward the sunlit shoreline

entered.detail: smaller buildings visible along the distant coastline
bright sun glare and lens flare effect from facing the sun directly

segments.scene_description: Moving past the hotel into open beach terrain, the character breaks into a run. The camera faces into bright sunlight creating prominent lens flare effects. The beach stretches ahead with distant buildings visible along the coastline, while the hotel recedes behind and palm trees become distant silhouettes against the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny tropical beach that transitions from a steady walk past an art deco landmark into a fast-paced run toward a bright horizon. It begins with the character walking across the sand toward a distinctive hotel tower, passing a tall residential building and lining palm trees. As the character draws closer, the camera looks up at the towering facade of the Ocean View Hotel before gliding past its dense clusters of palms. The scene then opens into a wide stretch of beach as the character breaks into a run, causing the hotel to recede into the background. Finally, the camera faces directly into the intense sunlight, creating prominent lens flares as distant buildings and silhouetted palms emerge along the coastline.
